query:
INSERT INTO polygon_dividends (
        ticker,
        record_date,
        pay_date,
        declaration_date,
        ex_dividend_date,
        frequency,
        cash_amount,
        currency,
        distribution_type,
        historical_adjustment_factor,
        split_adjusted_cash_amount,
        is_staged
    )
    SELECT * FROM UNNEST (
        $1::text[],
        $2::date[],
        $3::date[],
        $4::date[],
        $5::date[],
        $6::bigint[],
        $7::float8[],
        $8::text[],
        $9::text[],
        $10::float8[],
        $11::float8[],
        $12::bool[]
    )
    ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
